__meta__.method: ONLY the Euro 2024 Market row is measured — from Polymarket per-match history via scripts/polymarket_match_backtest.py. J5L / DT / Hybrid rows are ESTIMATES: the app's models can't be re-run on past tournaments because point-in-time ratings aren't archived (J5L's curator sub-ratings never existed historically). WC 2022 has no per-match prediction-market data (Polymarket only ran a thin winner market with no price history), so nothing there is measurable. A fully-measured 4-model backtest begins live with WC 2026 — see live2026, populated by scripts/snapshot_backtest.py as matches resolve.

market.note: Measured: 45 of 51 matches had Polymarket per-match history. Strict 3-way 46.7%; ~81% on decisive matches — the market almost never makes a draw its top pick, so all draws count as misses.

euro2024.note: Only the Market row is measured (Polymarket). J5L / DT / Hybrid are estimates pending archived ratings.

wc2022.note: All rows are estimates — Polymarket ran no per-match WC 2022 markets and its winner market is too thin to have price history, so even the market leg can't be measured here.

live2026.note: 23 matches scored live. Pre-kickoff predictions locked from all models + markets, scored on the regulation result.
